untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of specific chart patterns (inverted cup dome shape, dome-shaped volume pattern) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. Pattern recognition requires multi-bar structural analysis, peak/trough detection, and shape matching that exceed the scope of the available technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using available indicators: Entry conditions approximate the downward breakout and elevated volume expectations of ICUP confirmation. Exit uses moving average crossover as a reasonable reversal signal per Rule 8. However, the core pattern detection (dome formation, inverted cup shape verification, volume dome mimicry) requires untranslatable logic.
